title: Change stop signal default to SIGTERM
body:
Fix #298 
Also add a bit more debugging around signals

comments.body:
Can you update the man page also with this text.

```
       Stop a container:  Defaults to send SIGTERM, and then SIGKILL after
        grace period.  The default StopSignal can be overriden during container creation, and
this signal will be sent rather then SIGTERM
```
BTW I think I introduced this bug...

:pushpin: Commit 2285647 has been approved by `rhatdan`
